welcome: Welcome to Jeopardish! The trivia game that's almost as good as the real thing!
Get ready to test your knowledge in this comedic trivia adventure!
Welcome aboard! We promise this is more fun than watching paint dry!
Time to see if your brain is as smart as you think it is!
Ready to play? Your knowledge is about to be put to the test!
positive: Brilliant answer! You're making this look easy!
Excellent! You're really in the zone!
negative: Oops! Don't worry, even Einstein got things wrong sometimes!
Not quite right, but hey, that's what learning is for!
Close, but no cigar! Better luck next time!
Swing and a miss! But keep trying!
Incorrect, but we believe in you!
Not this time, but don't give up!
That's not it, but you're still awesome!
streak: You're on a roll! 🎲 Keep this streak alive!
Streak alert! Someone's showing off their big brain!
Consecutive correct answers! The crowd goes wild!
Streak master! Are you cheating? (Just kidding!)
Multiple correct answers in a row! Impressive!

Streak champion! Keep those correct answers coming!
random: Fun fact: The human brain has about 86 billion neurons!
Did you know? Jeopardy! has been on air since 1964!
Trivia time: The word 'trivia' comes from Latin meaning 'three roads'!
Random thought: Knowledge is power, but trivia is fun!
Breaking news: You're doing great! Keep playing!
Science fact: Learning new things creates new neural pathways!
Game tip: The more you play, the smarter you get!
Reminder: There's no shame in getting an answer wrong!
Plot twist: Every wrong answer is a chance to learn something new!
Life lesson: Curiosity is the key to knowledge!
Game fact: This game has questions from all sorts of categories!
Pro tip: If you don't know the answer, make an educated guess!
Fun observation: Smart people play trivia games!
Daily reminder: You're braver than you believe and smarter than you seem!
Interesting note: The best way to learn is to have fun while doing it!
encouragement: Don't give up! Every expert was once a beginner!
Keep going! You're doing better than you think!
Stay positive! Learning is a journey, not a destination!
Chin up! Every question is a chance to learn something new!
Keep trying! Persistence is the key to success!
Don't worry! Even the smartest people get things wrong!
Stay curious! The best learners never stop asking questions!
Remember: It's not about being perfect, it's about having fun!
Keep that brain active! You're doing great!
milestone: Wow! You've tackled 50 questions like a champ!
Amazing dedication! You're a trivia warrior!
Persistence pays off! Look how far you've come!
